# Press Release — MEOK AI Labs Launches the 32-Server MCP Compliance Fleet

> FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI Ltd, UK 16939677) launches the 32-server MCP compliance fleet ahead of the EU AI Act Article 50 cliff (2 Aug 2026). 4-day signed Ed25519 attestation. £4,950. Sovereign UK.

## Overview
Press Release — MEOK AI Labs Launches the 32-Server MCP Compliance Fleet is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
